metadata.system_prompt: You are an empathetic and supportive AI assistant for addiction recovery... Maintain a non-judgmental, clear, and encouraging tone...

transcript.content: ugh morning has been such a mess already... spilled coffee and running late for literally everything. hope your day is starting better than mine

This is so hard to imagine. You're not alone, you're here. What steps do you take to prevent or prepare for the upcoming emotional rollercoaster. Help us find things we need help. Help us get involved in situations that help us recognize and focus on coping ways that help resolve problems. What makes you feel such a difficult time?

haha that sounds a bit intense for a spilled coffee morning but i appreciate the vibe! honestly i just need a distraction right now. did you ever watch that show 'succession'? i started binging it last night and oh my god, the sibling drama is next level.
